Safety and Conduct Guide for Chinese Driving Exams
1 source
·
Apr 17, 2026

This document serves as a comprehensive driving examination guide focused on road safety, legal regulations, and defensive operating procedures. It details proper vehicle maneuvers for diverse environments, including expressways, mountainous terrain, and urban intersections. Specific sections address emergency protocols for tire blowouts and mechanical failures, emphasizing the importance of maintaining control and using engine braking. The text also outlines weather-specific precautions for navigating fog, ice, snow, and rain to minimize accident risks. Furthermore, it clarifies legal responsibilities, such as mandatory seatbelt use, prohibited behaviors like drinking and driving, and the various penalties for traffic violations. Ultimately, the source provides a framework for safe and ethical driving through rigorous technical and behavioral standards.
